info.title: TiDB Cloud Dedicated Import API
info.description: TiDB Cloud Dedicated Import API (subset of the TiDB Cloud Dedicated API, generated from tidbcloud-oas-v1beta1-dedicated.swagger.json)

get.description: Lists all import tasks for a cluster. You can use query parameters to control sorting, pagination, and the number of results returned.

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the cluster to list import tasks for.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: The pagination token received from a previous [List import tasks](#tag/Import/operation/ListImports) request. Use this token to retrieve the next page of results.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum number of import tasks to return. If not specified, at most 10 node specs will be returned.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Specifies the sorting order of results. Use a comma-separated list of field names, optionally appending `desc` for descending order. For example, `createTime, name desc`. By default, fields are sorted in ascending order.

post.description: Creates an import task to import data into a cluster.

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the target cluster where data will be imported.

parameters.name: import
parameters.description: The configuration details of the import task to be created.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific import task by its ID.

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the cluster that contains the import task.

parameters.name: importId
parameters.description: The ID of the import task to retrieve.

post.description: Cancels a running import task by its ID.

parameters.name: clusterId
parameters.description: The ID of the cluster that contains the import task.

parameters.name: importId
parameters.description: The ID of the import task to cancel.

schema.description: The ID of the import task.

id.description: The access key ID for accessing the S3 source.

secret.description: The secret access key for accessing the S3 source. This field is input-only and not returned in responses.

S3SourceAccessKey.description: The access key of the import source.

schema.description: The name of the database containing the target table.

table.description: The name of the table within the database.

@type.description: A URL or resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized protocol buffer message.

authType.description: The authentication method for accessing the Azure Blob Storage source.

sasToken.description: The Shared Access Signature (SAS) token for accessing the Azure Blob Storage source. This field is input-only and not returned in responses.

uri.description: The Azure Blob Storage URI of the import source, in the format of `azure://<account>.blob.core.windows.net/<container>/<path>` or `https://<account>.blob.core.windows.net/<container>/<path>`.

v1beta1AzureBlobSource.description: The Azure Blob Storage source of the import.

separator.description: The character used to separate values in the CSV file.

delimiter.description: The character used to enclose string values in the CSV file.

header.description: Indicates whether the first row of the CSV file contains column headers.

notNull.description: Indicates whether the columns in the CSV file can be NULL.

nullValue.description: The string representation of NULL values in the CSV file.

backslashEscape.description: Indicates whether to escape backslashes in the CSV file.

trimLastSeparator.description: Indicates whether to remove trailing separators from each row in the CSV file.

v1beta1CSVFormat.description: The format of the CSV file.

importOptions.description: The configuration options for the import task.
importOptions.title: ImportOptions

source.description: The data source for the import task.
source.title: ImportSource

targetTableInfos.description: A list of destination tables and their configurations for the import.
targetTableInfos.title: ImportTargetTableInfo

checkItems.description: A list of validation items that are checked during the import process.
checkItems.title: ImportValidationItem

v1beta1DuplicationHandlingForSQLEnum.description:
The duplication handling for SQL.

 - UNSPECIFIED: The duplication handling for SQL is unknown.
 - REPLACE: The duplication handling for SQL is replace.
 - IGNORE: The duplication handling for SQL is ignore.
 - ERROR: The duplication handling for SQL is error.

uri.description: The Google Cloud Storage URI of the import source.

authType.description: The authentication method for accessing the Google Cloud Storage source.

serviceAccountKey.description: The service account key for accessing the Google Cloud Storage source.
serviceAccountKey.title: The service account key

v1beta1GCSSource.description: The Google Cloud Storage source of the import.

name.description: The name of the import task, in the format of `clusters/{cluster_id}/imports/{import_id}`.

clusterId.description: The ID of the target cluster for the import.

totalSize.description: The total size of the data to be imported, in bytes.

createTime.description: The timestamp when the import task was created, in the [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format.

completeTime.description: The timestamp when the import task was completed, in the [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) format.

state.description: The state of the import task.

completePercent.description: The percentage of import progress, excluding post-processing.

message.description: An error message if the import task failed. Otherwise, empty.

creator.description: The email address of the user who create the import task.

creationDetails.description: The additional details about how the import task is created.
creationDetails.title: CreationDetails

importId.description: The unique identifier of the import task.

v1beta1ImportAzureBlobAuthTypeEnum.description:
The type of the access method.

 - UNSPECIFIED: The access method is unknown.
 - SAS_TOKEN: The access method is sas token.

v1beta1ImportFileTypeEnum.description:
The type of the file.

 - UNSPECIFIED: The type of the file is unknown.
 - CSV: CSV type.
 - SQL: SQL type.
 - AURORA_SNAPSHOT: Aurora snapshot type.
 - PARQUET: Parquet type.

v1beta1ImportGcsAuthTypeEnum.description:
The type of the access method.

 - UNSPECIFIED: The access method is unknown.
 - SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY: The access method is service account key.

fileType.description:
The format of the file to import.

- `"CSV"`: CSV files. For more information, see [Import CSV Files from Cloud Storage into TiDB Cloud Dedicated](https://docs.pingcap.com/tidbcloud/import-csv-files/).

- `"PARQUET"`: Apache Parquet files. For more information, see [Import Apache Parquet Files from Cloud Storage into TiDB Cloud Dedicated](https://docs.pingcap.com/tidbcloud/import-parquet-files/).

- `"SQL"`: SQL files.

- `"AURORA_SNAPSHOT"`: Amazon Aurora snapshot files.

csvFormat.description: The format specification for CSV files.
csvFormat.title: CSVFormat

duplicationHandling.description:
Specifies how to handle duplicate records when importing SQL files.

- `"UNSPECIFIED"`: the behavior is undefined.

- `"REPLACE"`: existing rows are replaced with new data from the import file.

- `"IGNORE"`: duplicate rows are skipped.

- `"ERROR"`: the import fails if a duplicate row is found.

validateOnly.description: If set to `true`, the request is validated but not executed. Defaults to `false`.

v1beta1ImportOptions.description: The options of the import task.

v1beta1ImportS3AuthTypeEnum.description:
The type of the access method.

 - UNSPECIFIED: The access method is unknown.
 - ROLE_ARN: The access method is role arn.
 - ACCESS_KEY: The access method is access key.

type.description:
The source from which data is imported.

When this field is set, the corresponding configuration field must also be provided. For example, if type is `S3`, the `s3` field must be specified.

- `"UNSPECIFIED"`: the import source is not specified.

- `"S3"`: import from Amazon S3.

- `"GCS"`: import from Google Cloud Storage.

- `"AZURE_BLOB"`: import from Azure Blob Storage.

s3.description: The configuration details for importing from Amazon S3. This is required when `type` is `S3`.
s3.title: S3Source

gcs.description: The configuration details for importing from Google Cloud Storage. This is required when `type` is `GCS`.
gcs.title: GCSSource

azureBlob.description: The configuration details for importing from Azure Blob Storage. This is required when `type` is `AZURE_BLOB`.
azureBlob.title: AzureBlobSource

v1beta1ImportSourceTypeEnum.description:
The source type of the import.

 - UNSPECIFIED: Indicates that the import source is not specified.
 - S3: Indicates that the import source is an AWS S3 resource.
 - GCS: Indicates that the import source is a Google Cloud Storage resource.
 - AZURE_BLOB: Indicates that the import source is an Azure Blob Storage resource.

v1beta1ImportStateEnum.description:
The state of the import.

 - UNSPECIFIED: Indicates that the import state is not specified.
 - PREPARING: Indicates that the import is being prepared.
 - IMPORTING: Indicates that the import is in progress.
 - COMPLETED: Indicates that the import is completed successfully.
 - FAILED: Indicates that the import has failed.
 - CANCELING: Indicates that the import is in the process of being canceled.
 - CANCELED: Indicates that the import has been canceled.

targetTable.description: The target table where the data is imported.
targetTable.title: Table

customFile.description: The custom file URI to import data into the target table. If not specified, TiDB Cloud Dedicated uses the default naming conventions to match files to tables.

matchedUri.description: The actual source file URI that is matched to this table during import processing.

v1beta1ImportTargetTableInfo.description: The target table info of the import task.

v1beta1ImportValidationItem.description:
The validation item of the import.

 - IMPORT_VALIDATION_ITEM_UNSPECIFIED: The validation item is unspecified.
 - SOURCE_ACCESS_CHECK: The validation item is source access check.
 - TARGET_ACCESS_CHECK: The validation item is target access check.(deprecated)
 - FILTER_AND_RULE_CHECK: The validation item is filter and rule check.(deprecated)
 - IMPORT_PRECHECK: The validation item is import precheck.
 - TARGET_TABLE_EMPTY_CHECK: The validation item is target table empty check.
 - ESTIMATE_SIZE: The validation item is estimate size.(deprecated)
 - IMPORT_DATA_ONLY_CHECK: The validation item is import data only check.

totalSize.description: The total number of import tasks.
totalSize.title: aip:ignore

nextPageToken.description: The token to retrieve the next page of results. Use this value as the `pageToken` parameter in the next request. This field is empty when there are no more pages.

v1beta1ListImportsResponse.description: The response message for listing imports.

uri.description: The S3 URI of the import source.

authType.description: The authentication method for accessing the S3 bucket.

roleArn.description: The AWS IAM role ARN used for access. This is required when `authType` is set to `"ROLE_ARN"`.

accessKey.description: The AWS access key credentials used for access. This is required when `authType` is set to `"ACCESS_KEY"`.
accessKey.title: AccessKey

v1beta1S3Source.description: The S3 source of the import.
